mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV_STOCK ( PLANT_CD, WAREHOUSE_CD, LOCATION_CD, ITEM_CD, LOT_NO, STOCK_QTY, UNIT, STOCK_STATUS, EXPIRE_DT, MFG_DT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{request.plantCd}, #{request.warehouseCd}, #{request.locationCd}, #{request.itemCd}, #{request.lotNo}, #{request.qty}, #{request.unit}, #{request.stockStatus}, #{request.expireDt}, #{request.mfgDt}, #{request.regUserId}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE STOCK_QTY = STOCK_QTY + #{request.qty}, UPD_USER_ID = #{request.regUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE INV_STOCK SET RESERVED_QTY = COALESCE(RESERVED_QTY, 0) + #{qty}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE STOCK_ID = #{stockId}
